one_liner_pitch: mockup_path with javascript: URL scheme — must be rejected before reaching <iframe src>.
spec_alignment_notes: S-1 regression — MOCKUP_PAT.fullmatch refuses colons so the iframe is never emitted.

one_liner_pitch: mockup_path with file:// scheme pointing at arbitrary local file.
spec_alignment_notes: S-1 regression — file:///etc/passwd must be rejected.

one_liner_pitch: mockup_path with data: URL that embeds scripted HTML.
spec_alignment_notes: S-1 regression — data:text/html,<script>... must be rejected.
